ip_outcome_note: Vision flagged 'Corrupted Goku or dark-controlled fighter' at med confidence. Card skill text reads: 'If your Leader Card is Mira, it gains +15000 power...' The card is Mira-locked, not Goku-locked. The depicted white-haired figure firing a dark corrupted beam is Mira (the Time Breakers' primary fighter) under Demigra's dark influence — not Goku. The 'Dark Kamehameha' is a technique used by fighters under dark/Time Breaker mind control in Xenoverse canon, and Mira is the expected Leader synergy target for this card. The white hair is consistent with Mira's design (silver/white), not a corrupted Goku (who would retain black spiky hair with SS transformation changes). Refute 'Corrupted Goku' — figure is more consistent with Mira or a dark-controlled fighter as defined by Time Breaker lore, with the Mira Leader lock as definitive mechanical evidence.

trivia_bullets.text: Dark Kamehameha (BT4-121) is a black Uncommon Extra card from Colossal Warfare (DBS-B04, July 2018). It is Mira-Leader-locked: the card text reads 'If your Leader Card is Mira, it gains +15000 power for the duration of the battle, and if it's your turn, choose up to 1 of your opponent's Battle Cards with an energy cost of 4 or less and send it to their Warp.' The card is mechanically part of the BT4 Time Breakers / Mira-leader package [Source: WebSearch snippets from levelupgamesmd.com and coretcg.com for BT4-121].

The 'Dark Kamehameha' in Dragon Ball Xenoverse lore is a corrupted version of Goku's Kamehameha used by fighters under Time Breaker dark energy influence. The depicted white-haired figure is consistent with Mira's canonical appearance (silver-white hair, muscular humanoid) rather than Goku (who retains black or golden SS hair in all forms). The card's Mira Leader synergy is the decisive mechanical identifier [Source: Dragon Ball Xenoverse via WebSearch: Demigra/Time Breakers lore; card text via WebSearch snippets].
sources: WebSearch snippets: BT4-121 card text listings

trivia_bullets.text: BT4 introduced [Dark Over Realm] as a more powerful version of BT3's [Over Realm] mechanic, specifically attached to Demigra and his Time Breaker faction. Dark Kamehameha (BT4-121) is a support piece in that same faction's Extra card slot, providing a massive power boost (+15000) plus removal when paired with a Mira Leader — making it one of BT4's high-impact Extra cards for the black/dark archetype [Source: dbs-cardgame.com design concept page via WebSearch; BT4-121 card text].
